creator: rb@gid.co.uk
text:
I have an amd64 server that was transitioned to OpenZFS when that was introduced, and has since been progressively updated to 13.2-RELEASE. When OpenZFS was introduced, autotrim on that pool was set to `on'. Since then the setting has at some point reverted to `off', presumably due to a system or pool version upgrade.

No better idea of when this happened, opening this bug in case anyone else has the same problem.
